---
title: "Teriyaki Sauce"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Sauces and Condiments"]
---

**Ingredients:**

-   1⁄4 cup [soy sauce](https://www.food.com/about/soy-sauce-473)

-   1 cup [water](https://www.food.com/about/water-459)

-   1⁄2 teaspoon [ground ginger](https://www.food.com/about/ginger-166)

-   1⁄4 teaspoon [garlic
    powder](https://www.food.com/about/garlic-powder-501)

-   5 tablespoons packed [brown
    sugar](https://www.food.com/about/brown-sugar-375)

-   1 -2 tablespoon [honey](https://www.food.com/about/honey-155)

-   2 tablespoons
    [cornstarch](https://www.food.com/about/cornstarch-137)

-   1⁄4 cup [cold water](https://www.food.com/about/water-459)

**Directions:**

-   **Mix all but cornstarch and 1/4c water in a sauce pan and begin
    heating.**

-   **Mix cornstarch and cold water in a cup and dissolve.**

-   **After sauce is simmering, add cornstarch and water mixture,
    whisking well until sauce thickens.**

-   **Heat until sauce thickens to desired thickness.**

-   **Add water to thin if you over-thick it.**

**Source:
[[https://www.food.com/recipe/restaurant-teriyaki-sauce-133751]{.underline}](https://www.food.com/recipe/restaurant-teriyaki-sauce-133751)**
